overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing a character in a brown leather jacket walking through wet urban streets at night in the Westwood district. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections with passing traffic including buses and taxis, and walks under highway overpasses with reflective wet pavement throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past shuttered storefronts and newspaper boxes

entered.detail: bright yellow newspaper box on the sidewalk
closed metal security shutters on storefronts
trees lining the sidewalk with green foliage
glass and metal bus shelter with advertising

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk at night, passing closed storefronts with metal shutters and yellow newspaper vending machines. Street trees line the right side while the character approaches a bus stop shelter.

events.description: city bus passes by on the right side of the frame
character crosses the street between moving vehicles including a taxi and sports car

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while navigating around passing traffic including a bus and taxis

notable_agents.action: city bus driving past the intersection with headlights on
yellow taxi cab waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: large city transit bus with illuminated destination sign
blue USPS postal mailbox on the corner
classic yellow taxi cab distinctive of Liberty City

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the sidewalk and crosses a busy intersection at night. A city bus passes by on the right while the character navigates between vehicles including a yellow taxi and a green sports car. The bus stop shelter falls behind as the character reaches the opposite curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: auto dealership lot approaching highway overpass

events.description: passing the Auto Erotica dealership with bright red neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking past the auto dealership and approaching the highway overpass in the distance

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving past the dealership on the street

entered.detail: curved building with red neon 'AUTOEROTICA' signage and chain link fence
elevated highway structure visible in the distance
orange and white striped traffic cones near the dealership

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the Auto Erotica dealership with its distinctive red neon signage and chain link fence. Traffic cones line the sidewalk as the character approaches a highway overpass visible in the distance. A blue sedan drives past on the right while the wet pavement reflects the streetlights.

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the highway overpass with dimmer lighting
location text 'Westwood' appears in the bottom right corner of the screen

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass into the Westwood district with darker, enclosed surroundings

entered.detail: large concrete support pillars for the highway above
graffiti markings on the walls under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered area beneath the highway overpass, where the lighting becomes dimmer and more shadowed. Concrete pillars line the left side while graffiti marks the walls. The location text 'Westwood' appears on screen as the character continues walking through this sheltered urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet urban district at night, transitioning from open city sidewalks to the shadowed enclosure of a highway overpass. It begins with the character walking past closed storefronts and yellow newspaper vending machines, moving steadily toward a bus stop shelter. As the character leaves the sidewalk, the scene shifts to a busy intersection where they navigate between a passing city bus, a yellow taxi, and a green sports car before reaching the opposite curb. The camera then follows the character past the red neon signage of the Auto Erotica dealership and a line of traffic cones, with a blue sedan driving past on the reflective, rain-slicked pavement. Finally, the environment closes in as the character enters the dim, sheltered corridor beneath a highway overpass, passing concrete pillars and graffiti-covered walls while the location text Westwood appears on screen.
